evidence.summary: Error group group-incident-a crossed the warning threshold at 2026-07-01T00:00:00Z.

hypotheses.summary: Recent checkout-api deploy changed payment retry behavior and may be surfacing as duplicate timeout errors.

recommended_actions: Compare the incident window against the last checkout-api deploy.
Inspect traces with fingerprint group-incident-a before changing code.
Escalate to the service owner if the error rate remains elevated for another window.
residual_uncertainty: Template sample did not query a live Canary endpoint.
No remediation claim was created from this sample.
